title: Make command output and control-tower dashboard live and actionable
description: Final review blockers: command results are queued next-turn rather than immediately visible in TUI/print, and the rich overlay is a static snapshot. Deliver command results on every Pi mode, update a live overlay from runner snapshots, preserve historical lanes/usage from artifacts, add cancellation and detail-first human gate approve/reject controls, and remove fixture whitespace failures.
acceptance_criteria: Dry-run/status/dashboard output is immediately visible in TUI, RPC, JSON/print-appropriate surfaces; an open overlay updates as child/tool/verification/merge state changes; gate actions require detail view; cancellation propagates; historical dashboard preserves lanes/usage; render/RPC/print tests pass and git diff --check is clean.
